---
title: "Pilot Pipeline - Code Availability"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Packages

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(xml2)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(bib2df)
```

## Configuration

```{r}
# BibTeX metadata file exported from Zotero
bib_file <- "PilotItems.bib"

# Folder containing GROBID TEI-XML files for the pilot articles
xml_folder <- "XML_Pilot"

# Output RDS file to be read by RUN_ME.qmd
output_file <- "pilot-data.rds"
```

## Read metadata from BibTeX

```{r}
#| echo: false

bib_raw <- bib2df(bib_file)

meta_data <- bib_raw %>%
  transmute(
    title    = str_remove_all(TITLE, "[{}]"),
    abstract = ABSTRACT,
    DOI      = DOI
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(DOI) & nzchar(DOI)) %>%
  mutate(doi_no_slash = gsub("/", "", DOI))

message("Extracted ", nrow(meta_data), " items with a DOI from BibTeX")
```

## Parse TEI XML files

```{r}
#| echo: false

clean_url <- function(url) str_remove_all(url, "[​‌‍­﻿]")

parse_tei_xml <- function(xml_path) {
  tryCatch({
    doc <- read_xml(xml_path)
    ns  <- c(tei = "http://www.tei-c.org/ns/1.0")

    # Title (use as fallback if not in RDF)
    title_node <- xml_find_first(
      doc, "//tei:titleStmt/tei:title[@level='a'][@type='main']", ns)
    if (is.na(title_node))
      title_node <- xml_find_first(doc, "//tei:titleStmt/tei:title", ns)
    title <- if (!is.na(title_node)) trimws(xml_text(title_node)) else NA_character_

    # Abstract (fallback)
    abs_nodes <- xml_find_all(doc, "//tei:profileDesc//tei:abstract//tei:p", ns)
    abstract  <- paste(xml_text(abs_nodes), collapse = " ")
    if (nchar(trimws(abstract)) == 0) abstract <- NA_character_

    # Full text from body + back matter
    body_nodes <- xml_find_all(
      doc, "//tei:body//*[self::tei:p or self::tei:head][not(ancestor::tei:figure[@type='table'])][not(ancestor::tei:formula)]", ns)
    back_nodes <- xml_find_all(
      doc, "//tei:back//*[self::tei:p or self::tei:head][not(ancestor::tei:listBibl)][not(ancestor::tei:figure[@type='table'])][not(ancestor::tei:formula)]", ns)
    full_text  <- gsub("\n", " ",
      paste(c(xml_text(body_nodes), xml_text(back_nodes)), collapse = " "))

    # URLs: extract target attribute and parent paragraph as context
    url_refs <- xml_find_all(doc, "//*[@type='url']", ns)
    url_data <- map_dfr(url_refs, function(ref) {
      target <- clean_url(xml_attr(ref, "target"))
      if (is.na(target) || !nzchar(target)) return(NULL)
      target  <- str_remove(target, "[.,;:!?]+$")
      context <- trimws(xml_text(xml_parent(ref)))
      tibble(url = target, context = context)
    })

    urls_structured <- if (nrow(url_data) > 0) unique(url_data$url) else character(0)

    # Replace each <ref type="url"> element's (potentially space-broken) text
    # content with the clean target URL before running the regex, so broken
    # forms don't appear as spurious separate links.
    full_text_for_regex <- full_text
    for (ref in url_refs) {
      broken <- xml_text(ref)
      tgt    <- clean_url(xml_attr(ref, "target"))
      if (!is.na(tgt) && nzchar(tgt) && nzchar(broken))
        full_text_for_regex <- str_replace_all(full_text_for_regex, fixed(broken), tgt)
    }
    urls_text <- unlist(str_extract_all(
      paste(abstract, full_text_for_regex), "https?://[^\\s<>\"'\\)\\]]+"))
    urls_text <- str_remove(urls_text, "[.,;:!?]+$")
    urls_text <- sapply(urls_text, clean_url, USE.NAMES = FALSE)

    all_urls <- unique(c(urls_structured, urls_text))
    all_urls <- all_urls[nzchar(all_urls)]

    # DOI from XML (fallback)
    doi_node <- xml_find_first(doc, "//tei:idno[@type='DOI']", ns)
    doi_xml  <- if (!is.na(doi_node)) trimws(xml_text(doi_node)) else NA_character_

    list(title = title, abstract = abstract, full_text = full_text,
         urls = all_urls, url_data = url_data, doi_xml = doi_xml)

  }, error = function(e) {
    warning("Failed to parse: ", basename(xml_path), " — ", e$message)
    list(title = NA_character_, abstract = NA_character_, full_text = NA_character_,
         urls = character(0),
         url_data = tibble(url = character(0), context = character(0)),
         doi_xml = NA_character_)
  })
}

xml_paths <- list.files(xml_folder,
                        pattern = "\\.(tei\\.xml|xml)$",
                        recursive = TRUE,
                        full.names = TRUE)

message("Found ", length(xml_paths), " XML files in ", xml_folder)

df_fulltext <- map_dfr(xml_paths, function(xml_file) {
  result <- parse_tei_xml(xml_file)

  doi_no_slash <- if (!is.na(result$doi_xml)) {
    gsub("/", "", result$doi_xml)
  } else {
    # GROBID appends .tei.xml to the full original filename (including .pdf),
    # so strip .pdf.tei.xml first, then fall back to .tei.xml or .xml
    basename(xml_file) %>%
      str_replace("\\.pdf\\.tei\\.xml$|\\.tei\\.xml$|\\.xml$", "")
  }

  tibble(
    doi_no_slash = doi_no_slash,
    title_xml    = result$title,
    abstract_xml = result$abstract,
    full_text    = result$full_text,
    urls         = list(result$urls),
    url_data     = list(result$url_data)
  )
})

message("Parsed ", nrow(df_fulltext), " XML files")
```

## Join metadata with full text

```{r}
full_data <- meta_data %>%
  left_join(df_fulltext, by = "doi_no_slash") %>%
  mutate(
    # BibTeX metadata takes priority; fall back to XML-extracted values
    title    = coalesce(title, title_xml),
    abstract = coalesce(abstract, abstract_xml),
    `DOI Link` = paste0("https://doi.org/", DOI)
  ) %>%
  select(-title_xml, -abstract_xml)

message(sum(!is.na(full_data$full_text)), " of ", nrow(full_data),
        " articles matched to an XML file")
```

## Keyword definitions

```{r}
key_phrases_exact <- c("code", "script", "osf", "github", "gitlab",
                       "zenodo", "figshare", "supplement", "replicate",
                       "reproduce", "appendix")

key_phrases_gapped <- list(
  c("code", "shared")
)
max_gap <- 3
```

## Extract keyword context

```{r}
extract_keyword_context <- function(text, key_phrases_exact, key_phrases_gapped, max_gap) {
  if (is.na(text) || nchar(trimws(text)) == 0)
    return(tibble(keyword = character(0), context = character(0)))

  sentences <- unlist(strsplit(text, "(?<=[.!?])\\s+", perl = TRUE))

  # Returns one row per unique sentence that matches pattern, labelled with kw_label
  contexts_for <- function(kw_label, pattern) {
    idx <- unique(which(str_detect(sentences, pattern)))
    if (length(idx) == 0) return(tibble(keyword = character(0), context = character(0)))
    map_dfr(idx, function(i) {
      tibble(
        keyword = kw_label,
        context = paste(na.omit(c(
          if (i > 1) sentences[i - 1] else NA_character_,
          sentences[i],
          if (i < length(sentences)) sentences[i + 1] else NA_character_
        )), collapse = " ")
      )
    })
  }

  # Prefix match (\bkeyword) catches all case variants and suffixes:
  # e.g. "supplement" also matches Supplement, supplementary, supplemental
  exact_results <- map_dfr(key_phrases_exact, function(kw) {
    contexts_for(kw, regex(paste0("\\b", kw), ignore_case = TRUE))
  })

  gapped_results <- map_dfr(key_phrases_gapped, function(pair) {
    pattern <- regex(
      paste0("\\b", pair[1], "(?:\\s+[\\w,\\.\\!\\?]+){0,", max_gap, "}\\s+\\b", pair[2]),
      ignore_case = TRUE
    )
    contexts_for(paste(pair, collapse = " "), pattern)
  })

  bind_rows(exact_results, gapped_results)
}

full_data <- full_data %>%
  mutate(
    keyword_data = map(full_text, ~extract_keyword_context(
      .x, key_phrases_exact, key_phrases_gapped, max_gap)),
    included        = FALSE,
    excluded        = FALSE,
    second_reviewer = FALSE,
    note            = ""
  )

message("Keyword extraction complete")
```

## Save pilot data

```{r}
saveRDS(full_data, file = output_file)
message("Saved ", nrow(full_data), " articles to: ", output_file)
```
